hero.text: Believe in the magic within you.
hero.author: Anonymous

aries.general: Excitement is in the air today, Aries. Embrace new experiences!
aries.love: Passion ignites your relationships; open your heart.
aries.career: Opportunities are knocking; be ready to answer!

taurus.general: Slow down, Taurus; it's time for some self-care and relaxation.
taurus.love: A calm approach in love will bring warmth and affection.
taurus.career: Focus on stability and long-term goals.

gemini.general: Your curiosity leads you to discover exciting ideas today.
gemini.love: Communication is key to finding harmony with your partner.
gemini.career: Networking could pay off handsomely now.

cancer.general: A wave of emotions might sweep over you; embrace them.
cancer.love: Nurturing and support strengthen your relationships.
cancer.career: Creative ideas blossom, but ensure they're practical.

leo.general: Shine bright today, Leo. Your confidence is magnetic!
leo.love: Romance is in the air; don't be afraid to express your feelings.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities arise; seize the moment!

virgo.general: Precision and attention to detail will serve you well today.
virgo.love: A practical approach to relationships can clear misunderstandings.
virgo.career: Trust your analysis; decision-making is crucial.

libra.general: Focus on balance and harmony; it's essential today.
libra.love: Open dialogue with loved ones strengthens bonds.
libra.career: Collaboration can lead to significant achievements.

scorpio.general: Your intuition is heightened; listen to your instincts.
scorpio.love: Deep emotional connections will blossom if you open up.
scorpio.career: Perseverance on a tough project will pay off soon.

sagittarius.general: Adventure awaits! Seek it out with an open mind.
sagittarius.love: Spontaneity keeps the romance alive; surprise your partner.
sagittarius.career: Don't shy away from taking risks; they could lead to growth.

capricorn.general: Patience and persistence are key to today’s achievements.
capricorn.love: A practical approach will foster trust in your relationships.
capricorn.career: Your hard work will soon bear fruit; stay the course.

aquarius.general: Innovation and creativity are your allies today; embrace them.
aquarius.love: A unique approach to love will revive your relationship.
aquarius.career: Push the boundaries and think outside the box.

pisces.general: Allow your emotions to guide you toward your truth.
pisces.love: Compassion and empathy will enhance your connections.
pisces.career: Trust your instincts to navigate complex situations.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The future depends on what you do today.
professional.author: Mahatma Gandhi

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: Don’t watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
professional.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The harder you work for something, the greater you’ll feel when you achieve it.
motivation.author: Anonymous

motivation.text: Dream big and dare to fail.
motivation.author: Norman Vaughan

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
motivation.author: Anonymous

captions.text: Life is an adventure; enjoy every moment.
captions.author: Anonymous

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Stewart Brand

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The great growling engine of change – technology.
tech.author: Alvin Toffler

fun.text: Life is short, smile while you still have teeth!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: If you think Adventure is dangerous, try routine; it's lethal.
fun.author: Paulo Coelho

fun.text: I'm not arguing, I'm just explaining why I'm right.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not too sure.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don’t scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Our faith can transform the ordinary into the extraordinary.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Doubt your doubts before you doubt your faith.
faith.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

faith.text: Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie Ten Boom

faith.text: Faith is not about everything turning out OK; it's about being OK no matter how things turn out.
faith.author: Anonymous

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The fool doth think he is wise, but the wise man knows himself to be a fool.
wisdom.author: William Shakespeare

wisdom.text: With age comes wisdom, but sometimes age comes alone.
wisdom.author: Anonymous
